signals.headline: Ethereum price up $98
signals.raw:
Ethereum price up $98.74 (4.3%) to $2,403.78 as of 9:15 a.m. ET today (April 22, 2026)** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][6]

Ethereum's price rose from $2,317.80 on April 20[3] amid ongoing **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade** entering final testing phase, boosting network efficiency, wallet abstraction, and Layer 2 TVL milestones like Base and Arbitrum[2]. Spot ETH ETF inflows hit all-time high
